title: Authenticate pckg submodule checkout in Open VSX publish CI

source.subject: ci: authenticate pckg submodule checkout with GITHUB_TOKEN

body:
Authenticates **pckg submodule checkout** in Open VSX publish CI using `GITHUB_TOKEN`.

## Provenance

- **Completed:** 2026-04-21

## Catalog scope

- **Workstream:** `editor-extension`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-open-vsx`

## Relation
CI access for private submodule deps during extension build.
